emails.subject: Re: Public Service Company of N.Mexico #522906
emails.body: Re: Public Service Company of N.Mexico #522906 Looks like a real time guy put this deal in along with three others for El Paso. Real Time isn't used to marking confirms on their deals, since they're usually just trading hour-ahead. Let me know how you'd like these to be changed (i.e. "yes-agreement" or "yes-counterparty to send confirm"), and I'll do that right away. Thanks, Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 02/15/2001 07:24 AM

emails.subject: Public Service Company of N.Mexico #522906
emails.body: Public Service Company of N.Mexico #522906 This deal looks to me like it needs to be confirmed, but it was marked no confirm. Do you know of a reason why it shouldn't be confirmed? If not, I need a contact name so that i can send out a letter on it. Thanks! Kim
